description: Back in the woods, Mace, Mack, and Coulson spot mercenaries searching for Burrows and the briefcase. A plan is hatched: Mack and Coulson flank the merc team while Mace tries a direct approach. When a thug threatens him, Mace grabs the case and flees, but is confronted and injured. Mack and Coulson rescue him, at which point Mace confesses his super-strength was due to a drug cocktail that was in the destroyed briefcase, revealing the truth about his lack of Inhuman abilities.

transcript.line: Well, this is a fly in the ointment.
This squad must've been searching the debris trail. Who knows how many others are out there? How worried should we be about them getting into that thing?
It's biometrically locked. Only I can open it.
Still don't feel like telling us what's inside? Then I guess we're doing this. Mack and I can go around, ICE the three on the far side. Director, you take out the two by the case.
Are we sure there aren't more inside?
If there are, you can always shot put them with your super-strength.
